version_description:
v5 — Newtown Gastro Cancel Agent fixes (April 2026)

• Fixed agent_swap return target: ca-transfer-back now points to agent_e6cf0d7c969c505dc0354afac6 (Newtown Gastro Base Agent) instead of agent_71b06ec7239ceda05eae083b4c (legacy Premier base). This eliminates the "Premier MD" farewell bleed-through observed in call_09ae08d2d6dac62054f1766b574.
• Added ca-ev-started extract_dynamic_variables node as the new start_node_id (sets has_started_ca_flow=true), mirroring the Premier Cancel flow structure for consistent extraction at hand-off.
version_title: Newtown base swap-back fix + EV start node
